scene.message: Mark: ...Ugh...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Hey, Sonoda!{nl} Are you okay?!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...Uu... hmm...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...Inaba{wait_fr:60}...kun?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Gh...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Ow ow ow...{nl} M-my back...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: ...Oh.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: ...Ugh...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: That's right...{nl} We came back...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: H-hey, Sonoda!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...Same date.{nl} What year is it?{waitkey}{ret}
